commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed because there is no concrete blocking finding for automation to fix; this should continue through normal PR review and merge checks.; Cleared: The diff only forwards and validates an existing client request option through the Gateway and OpenAI transport path; it adds no dependencies, permissions, secret handling, CI changes, or new execution surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR forwards `response_format` from OpenAI-compatible `/v1/chat/completions` requests through `streamParams` and the embedded runner into OpenAI Chat Completions or Responses transport request shapes, with validation and regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: on current main, `POST /v1/chat/completions` can contain `response_format`, but `src/gateway/openai-http.ts` never copies it into `streamParams`, and the runner/transport options have no response-format field to carry onward. I did not run a live failing request in this read-only checkout.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because there is no concrete blocking finding for automation to fix; this should continue through normal PR review and merge checks.
